briefdescription.para: Aligned to the left edge of the box.
Aligned to the horizontal center of the box.
Aligned to the right edge of the box.
Aligned to the top edge of the box.
Aligned to the vertical center of the box.
Aligned to the bottom edge of the box.
The enum values for alignment.
Aligned to the left edge of the box.
Aligned to the horizontal center of the box.
Aligned to the right edge of the box.
Aligned to the top edge of the box.
Aligned to the vertical center of the box.
Aligned to the bottom edge of the box.
Aligned to the top-left corner of the box.
Aligned to the top-center of the box.
Aligned to the top-right corner of the box.
Aligned to the center-left of the box.
Aligned to the center of the box.
Aligned to the center-right of the box.
Aligned to the bottom-left corner of the box.
Aligned to the bottom-center of the box.
Aligned to the bottom-right corner of the box.
Mask for extracting the horizontal component.
Mask for extracting the vertical component.
The internal enum value.
Create a top-left alignment.
Create an alignment from an enum value.
Default destructor.
Default copy constructor.
Default copy assignment.
Assign an enum value.
Convert to the enum value.
Compare two alignments.
Compare with an enum value.
Test if this alignment is on the left side.
Test if this alignment is horizontally centered.
Test if this alignment is on the right side.
Test if this alignment is at the top.
Test if this alignment is vertically centered.
Test if this alignment is at the bottom.
Extract the horizontal alignment component.
Extract the vertical alignment component.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Coordinate availableWidth, const Coordinate contentWidth) const noexcept
memberdef.name: horizontalOffset

briefdescription.para: Calculate the horizontal offset for content aligned in an available width.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Coordinate availableHeight, const Coordinate contentHeight) const noexcept
memberdef.name: verticalOffset

briefdescription.para: Calculate the vertical offset for content aligned in an available height.
Get a hash for this alignment.
Compare an enum value with an alignment.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Alignment lhs, const Alignment rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator|

briefdescription.para: Bitwise OR for combining alignments.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Alignment lhs, const Alignment rhs) noexcept
memberdef.name: operator&

briefdescription.para: Bitwise AND for masking/extracting components of an alignment.

detaileddescription.para: Example: (alignment & Alignment::VerticalMask) yields the vertical component.

briefdescription.para: Get the raw enum value as integer.
Alignment of text or graphics in a box.
